amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 16 — paragraph 1 — point i
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 16 — paragraph 1 — point i

## Text proposed by the Commission

(i) to affix the CE marking to their high-risk AI systems to indicate the conformity with this Regulation in accordance with Article 49;

(i)
